case_title: GLADIS ASTENIA RODAS VS. IGNACIO DELA ROSA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELA ROSA, IGNACIO

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODAS, GLADIS ASTENIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF RODAS, GLADIS ASTENIA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $395.00 FILED BY RODAS, GLADIS ASTENIA AS TO DEFENDANT DELA ROSA, IGNACIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODAS, GLADIS ASTENIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELA ROSA, IGNACIO THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT THE CURRENT PROBLEMS WITH PLAINTIFF'S CAR WAS CAUSED BY AN ACT OR OMISSION OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
